title: Venezuelan Corn Flatbread
description: A gluten-free flatbread recipe inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, topped with roasted corn and rustic flavors.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the corn kernels, crumbled rustic bread, and chopped cilantro.
Add the shredded cheese and mix well.
In a separate bowl, mix together the beaten egg and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the egg mixture to the corn mixture and mix until well combined.
Place the flatbread pieces on a baking sheet and brush with butter.
Spoon the corn mixture onto the flatbread, dividing it evenly among the pieces.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
